title: ChatGPT Edu
description: Access ChatGPT Edu through your ASUrite login. The best way to use ChatGPT for free.

title: Claude Pro
description: Get Claude Pro through the ASU Claude Builder Club. Access Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and get free access to Claude Code.

title: Gemini Pro
description: Access Gemini Pro through your ASUrite login. Great for calendar management, screenshot-to-event parsing, and use with the Antigravity IDE.

title: GitHub Education Pack
description: Free GitHub Pro plus a huge bundle of developer tools including GitHub Copilot (tab complete + agent in VS Code), JetBrains IDEs, and much more — all with your .edu email.

title: Cursor Pro
description: AI-first code editor. Sign up with your .edu email for one year of Cursor Pro for free.

title: Windsurf
description: Codeium's AI-powered IDE. Get 50% off Pro with a .edu email address.

title: JetBrains IDEs
description: Free access to the full JetBrains suite (IntelliJ, PyCharm, WebStorm, etc.) including AI Assistant, via the GitHub Education Pack.

title: Microsoft 365 Premium
description: Free Microsoft 365 for college students — includes Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams, and Copilot AI integration across all apps.

title: Zed Pro
description: AI-powered code editor like Cursor. Sign up with your .edu email for one year of Zed Pro for free. Includes $10 of AI tokens and unlimited edit predictions.
